name: jiju-aluminium-es-webmcp
description: AI-agent-readable schema for JIJU Aluminium Spain inquiry forms and public contact actions.

forms.name: lead-capture
forms.purpose: Submit a quotation request for aluminum profiles, extrusion, CNC machining or surface treatment.
forms.expectedResult: The sales team receives the inquiry details and can reply by email or WhatsApp.

tools.name: submit_contact_request
tools.description: Prepare and submit a contact or quotation request through the website form.
